descriptionTemplate: Pollux gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: When played and after the Discard Phase, gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}; for each card in hand, gain 1 additional stack of {Sin Mark}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Pollux gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark} when played and after the discard phase, plus 1 additional stack per card in hand. {Sacred Heart} inflicts {Bleed} equal to 100% DMG. After being shuffled into the Draw Pile by playing a card, that {Sacred Heart}'s Arithmetica Cost becomes 0 this turn and applies {Bleed} equal to 100% DMG.
